162	/// One slot on the Lua value stack.  Wraps a `LuaValue` and an optional
163	/// to-be-closed delta (for the `tbclist` mechanism).

167	#[derive(Clone)]
168	pub struct StackValue {
169	    // C: StackValue.val — the payload TValue
170	    pub val: LuaValue,
171	    // C: StackValue.tbclist.delta — to-be-closed linked-list delta
172	    pub tbc_delta: u16,
173	}
174	
175	impl Default for StackValue {
176	    fn default() -> Self {
177	        StackValue {
178	            val: LuaValue::Nil,
179	            tbc_delta: 0,
180	        }
181	    }
182	}

## Report

**File / line:** `crates/lua-v

m/src/state.rs:1168` — `LuaState::grow_stack`.

**`
grow_stack` one-liner:** Inherent wrapper around the free function `do_::grow_stack`, d
ropping the `bool` success channel so existing call sites (`check_stack` et

al.) keep their `Result<(), LuaError>` signature.

**Family members also implemented (same `LuaState` impl block, "stack helpers"

family):**
- `dec_top` — saturating `top -= 1` (mirrors `L->top.p--`).
- `pe
ek_at(idx)` — clone the value at an absolute stack index without removing it

.
- `peek_top()` — clone the slot at `top - 1` (Nil if `top == 0`).
- `peek_string_at_top()` — return the
`GcRef<LuaString>` at `top - 1`; panics if the slot isn't a `L
uaValue::Str` (matches the C `tsvalue(s2v(L->top.p -

1))` contract — caller just pushed the string).
- `stack_at(idx)` — `&mut LuaValue` into the stack slot, used as

the lvalue form of `s2v`.
- `stack_set_nil(idx)` — write `Nil` into a slot (bounds-checked to be
safe under raw-Vec-extent indexing by `real

loc_stack`).
- `stack_resize(size)` — `Vec::resize_with(size, StackValue::default)`; `Result` kept for par

ity with the fallible C allocator.

**Newly surfaced todos noticed but
NOT implemented** (different families, deliberately skipped per instructions):
`ci_*` accessors (`ci_prev_instruction`, `ci_prev2_instruction`, `ci_skip_next_instruction`, `
ci_step_pc_back`, `get_ci_pcrel`, `get_ci_vararg_info`, `get_ci_lua_proto_num
params`, `ci_next_func`, `get_prev_ci`), hook family (`hook`, `set
_hook`, `_hook_call_noargs`, `call_hook_event`), and assorted `arith_op

`, `obj_to_string`, `str_to_num`, `table_getn`, `obj_type_name`.

**`cargo build -
p lua-cli`:** green (warnings only, no errors).

## Report

**File / line:** `crates/lua-vm/src/state.rs:1168` — `LuaState::grow_stack`.

**`grow_stack` one-liner:** Inherent wrapper around the free function `do_::grow_stack`, dropping the `bool` success channel so existing call sites (`check_stack` et al.) keep their `Result<(), LuaError>` signature.

**Family members also implemented (same `LuaState` impl block, "stack helpers" family):**
- `dec_top` — saturating `top -= 1` (mirrors `L->top.p--`).
- `peek_at(idx)` — clone the value at an absolute stack index without removing it.
- `peek_top()` — clone the slot at `top - 1` (Nil if `top == 0`).
- `peek_string_at_top()` — return the `GcRef<LuaString>` at `top - 1`; panics if the slot isn't a `LuaValue::Str` (matches the C `tsvalue(s2v(L->top.p - 1))` contract — caller just pushed the string).
- `stack_at(idx)` — `&mut LuaValue` into the stack slot, used as the lvalue form of `s2v`.
- `stack_set_nil(idx)` — write `Nil` into a slot (bounds-checked to be safe under raw-Vec-extent indexing by `realloc_stack`).
- `stack_resize(size)` — `Vec::resize_with(size, StackValue::default)`; `Result` kept for parity with the fallible C allocator.

**Newly surfaced todos noticed but NOT implemented** (different families, deliberately skipped per instructions): `ci_*` accessors (`ci_prev_instruction`, `ci_prev2_instruction`, `ci_skip_next_instruction`, `ci_step_pc_back`, `get_ci_pcrel`, `get_ci_vararg_info`, `get_ci_lua_proto_numparams`, `ci_next_func`, `get_prev_ci`), hook family (`hook`, `set_hook`, `_hook_call_noargs`, `call_hook_event`), and assorted `arith_op`, `obj_to_string`, `str_to_num`, `table_getn`, `obj_type_name`.

**`cargo build -p lua-cli`:** green (warnings only, no errors).

result:
Build is green.

## Report

**File / line:** `crates/lua-vm/src/state.rs:1168` — `LuaState::grow_stack`.

**`grow_stack` one-liner:** Inherent wrapper around the free function `do_::grow_stack`, dropping the `bool` success channel so existing call sites (`check_stack` et al.) keep their `Result<(), LuaError>` signature.

**Family members also implemented (same `LuaState` impl block, "stack helpers" family):**
- `dec_top` — saturating `top -= 1` (mirrors `L->top.p--`).
- `peek_at(idx)` — clone the value at an absolute stack index without removing it.
- `peek_top()` — clone the slot at `top - 1` (Nil if `top == 0`).
- `peek_string_at_top()` — return the `GcRef<LuaString>` at `top - 1`; panics if the slot isn't a `LuaValue::Str` (matches the C `tsvalue(s2v(L->top.p - 1))` contract — caller just pushed the string).
- `stack_at(idx)` — `&mut LuaValue` into the stack slot, used as the lvalue form of `s2v`.
- `stack_set_nil(idx)` — write `Nil` into a slot (bounds-checked to be safe under raw-Vec-extent indexing by `realloc_stack`).
- `stack_resize(size)` — `Vec::resize_with(size, StackValue::default)`; `Result` kept for parity with the fallible C allocator.

**Newly surfaced todos noticed but NOT implemented** (different families, deliberately skipped per instructions): `ci_*` accessors (`ci_prev_instruction`, `ci_prev2_instruction`, `ci_skip_next_instruction`, `ci_step_pc_back`, `get_ci_pcrel`, `get_ci_vararg_info`, `get_ci_lua_proto_numparams`, `ci_next_func`, `get_prev_ci`), hook family (`hook`, `set_hook`, `_hook_call_noargs`, `call_hook_event`), and assorted `arith_op`, `obj_to_string`, `str_to_num`, `table_getn`, `obj_type_name`.

**`cargo build -p lua-cli`:** green (warnings only, no errors).
